name: @context-engine/editor-kit
description: The M9 editor component KIT (design 06 section 3, D11). e06c1 ships its FOUNDATION: the module, the blocking tokens-only lint, and the closed 12-role hydration widget layer (design 04 section 4 step 4) that makes every C++-modeled panel themed because its widgets are kit widgets. The authored component families (tabs/tables/dialogs/toasts/chips/badges/empty-states/skeletons/tooltips) are e06c2's and land in this same package. Consumes @context-engine/editor-tokens through the e06b theme engine's CSS custom properties and NOTHING else: kit stylesheets carry no raw colour, font, shape or motion literal, which the webui-kit-tokens-only ctest enforces. Like editor-core and editor-tokens there is NO npm install and NO runtime Node — the sources are typechecked + bundled at BUILD time by the SHA-pinned tsgo + esbuild, and this manifest declares dependencies ONLY so the deny-by-default license gate (tools/check_licenses.py) sees them; it has none by design (the allowlist for the web layer is dockview-core ONLY).
